arts.ttl: Andy Walker states what Celtic 'family and friends' want Brendan Rodgers to do amid 'enormous' lead
arts.sum: Andy Walker explained that, speaking to ‘Celtic family and friends’, they would like the manager to perhaps hand the younger players a chance. “I think now, with this points gap, is there any possibility that you can see one of the young lads getting an opportunity?

arts.ttl: Celtic fans hit with stringent Aston Villa Champions League ticket scramble with vouchers and in-person pick up
arts.sum: The Premiership champions have been in negotiations with the Birmingham club to try and secure the maximum allocation

arts.ttl: Alistair Johnston accused of Celtic 'dark arts' as ex-refs criticise SFA whistler over no red card vs Ross County
arts.sum: I have no idea why it wasn’t given, because he’s right in front of goal – if you are going to deny an obvious goalscoring opportunity that is as blatant as you will come across. Alistair Johnston Celtic disciplinary record ( footystats.org ) Appearances: 91 Yellow cards: 11 Red cards: 0 Fouls committed: 20 Fouls against: 19

arts.ttl: Simon Jordan states the 'problem' with Celtic and Rangers, as he savages Ibrox board
arts.sum: Simon Jordan slams Rangers board amid Celtic success It has been a welcomed return for Rodgers in Glasgow, as normal service continues, in regards to Celtic dominating and Rangers struggling to even be second best.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers' big Kyogo & Adam Idah decision as Celtic boss prepares for Champions League vs Dundee, predicted XI
arts.sum: Which is why Rodgers must make a big decision on whether to start Adam Idah, Kyogo Furuhashi or Johnny Kenny in tonight’s game against Dundee at Dens Park. Credited with an assist for Celtic’s fourth goal, starting the young Irishman will give Rodgers the chance to keep Kyogo and Idah fresh for the Scottish Cup tie against Kilmarnock and the upcoming Champions League fixture against Young Boys.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's penalty shoot-out defeat vs Man United sparks debate about Celtic hero Kyogo Furuhashi
arts.sum: Chris Sutton defends Kyogo Furuhashi’s Celtic penalty stance However, it was what happened in England in the Carabao Cup that sparked this debate between Chris Sutton and Ian Ladyman about the Celtic striker as Arsenal lost on penalties to Man United .

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers' big Kyogo & Adam Idah decision as Celtic boss prepares for Champions League vs Dundee, predicted XI
arts.sum: Which is why Rodgers must make a big decision on whether to start Adam Idah, Kyogo Furuhashi or Johnny Kenny in tonight’s game against Dundee at Dens Park. arts.ttl: Celtic fans travel latest: Chaos on roads as Traffic Scotland issue key update on Friarton Bridge
arts.sum: Hoops supporters were urged to consider alternative travel options earlier this morning

arts.ttl: Gustav Isaksen requires Celtic 'sweet talking' as Lazio slam fast forward on transfer exit with £6.7m manoeuvre
arts.sum: The winger looks to be rapidly dropping out of the Lazio plans as Celtic watch on

arts.ttl: Major travel warning issued to Celtic supporters travelling to Dundee
arts.sum: Major travel warning issued to Celtic supporters travelling to Dundee.
